title: cymopterus gilmanii
intro: Cymopterus gilmanii, also known as Gilman's desert parsley, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Cymopterus gilmanii include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Cymopterus gilmanii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
